items.title:
RT by @WhiteHouse: VP Vance on @POTUS’s commitment to long term peace: 

“He’s thinking about this for my kids’ sake, for our grandkids’ sake, to ensure that you never have this regime with the ability to develop a nuclear weapon.”

items.title:
For millions of people forced to flee war, conflict and persecution, protection can mean the difference between life and death.

Amid growing global challenges, the right to seek safety matters more than ever.

Saturday is #WorldRefugeeDay.

https://www.unhcr.org/until-everyone-is-safe via @Refugees
